name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual data entry causes delayed payments. We automate the conversion of timesheet data instead of manual data entry into payroll systems.
problem_solved: Converting timesheet data into payroll-ready formats
